summary: Completed testing of Blendlink iteration 31 features: Subscription Tiers, Ranked Matchmaking, WebSocket Status, and Games page updates. Fixed 2 backend bugs (auth import error and MongoDB ObjectId serialization). All 20 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Subscription Tiers API: /api/subscriptions/tiers returns all tiers (free, basic, premium)
Subscription Tiers API: Ranked tiers returned correctly (bronze, silver, gold, platinum, diamond, master)
Ranked Leaderboard API: Limit parameter works correctly
WebSocket Status API: /api/ws/status returns connection stats
Photo Game API: /api/photo-game/pvp/queue-status returns queue info
frontend_tests_passed: Games page: Photo Battle Arena CTA visible with NEW badge
Games page: Minted Photos CTA visible
Photo Game page: Matchmaking UI loads correctly
Subscription page: Premium tier displayed ($9.99/mo with BEST VALUE badge)
Subscription page: User's ranked profile displayed (Silver, Rating: 1000)
Subscription page: All 6 ranked tiers displayed (Bronze to Master)
Subscription page: Top Players leaderboard section visible

bugs_fixed.issue: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'auth' - get_current_user was trying to import from non-existent auth module
bugs_fixed.fix: Replaced with inline JWT verification using jose library, matching server.py pattern

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error - ValueError: ObjectId object is not iterable
bugs_fixed.fix: Added re-fetch after insert_one to get document without _id field

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: 1) Subscription tiers API with free/basic($4.99)/premium($9.99) tiers, 2) Ranked matchmaking with 6 tiers (bronze to master), 3) WebSocket status endpoint, 4) Games page updated with Photo Battle Arena, Minted Photos, and Marketplace CTAs prominently displayed. Two bugs were fixed in subscription_tiers.py: auth import error and MongoDB ObjectId serialization. Stripe integration requires Stripe keys in env for actual payments.
